Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The standard process Post job ad Screen candidates Conduct interviews Make hiring decision Onboard employee Add to payroll Close case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 order is Post before Screen Screen before Decide and Interview Decide before Onboard Onboard before Payroll Payroll before Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is no edge between Interview and Decide in Model 1 so they are not ordered relative to each other

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This means the model allows deciding before interviewing or interviewing after later steps which is anomalous because the decision should normally follow interviews

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model 1 still preserves most of the expected backbone of the process because posting screening onboarding payroll and closing remain in a mostly sensible order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 2 sets Post before Screen and Interview Interview before Decide Decide before onboarding loop onboarding loop before payroll choice and payroll choice before Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is no edge from Screen to Interview or Decide in Model 2 so screening can occur after interview or even after decision

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That is anomalous because screening should usually happen before interviews and before a hiring decision

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The onboarding part in Model 2 is a loop so onboarding can be repeated multiple times

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Repeated onboarding is a deviation from the normal hire to retire logic where onboarding is generally a one time step

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The payroll part in Model 2 is an exclusive choice between Add to Payroll and skip so payroll is optional

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: Making payroll optional is especially problematic because hiring an employee without payroll undermines the integrity of the employment process

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Model 2 therefore contains more severe anomalies than Model 1 because it permits skipping an essential step and misplacing screening

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Model 1 is closer to the normative process since its main issue is the missing ordering between interview and decision while Model 2 has several stronger structural deviations
